manifest.author: ryanjamurphy
manifest.description: Build advanced search queries in Obsidian.
manifest.name: Vantage - Advanced search builder

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description:
Hotfix for width issues (see #8)

Hopefully this doesn't anger the CSS gods!

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Fixed a bug caused by deprecated functions in NL Dates. Natural language date search works again! 🎉

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: 1.4.0 adds the ability to begin a search by hitting enter on any input field. It also focuses input on the first input field when the search modal first appears.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Finally adds scrolling so that the Vantage modal is usable on smaller screens. Sorry it took so long! Thanks to @chhoumann for providing some easily-adopted CSS.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Vantage now wraps AND, OR, and NOT search tokens with `(` and `)`.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: v1.2.0 adds a "NOT" query to the search options and fixes a couple of minor bugs.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description:
Version 1.1.0 of Vantage adds a simple button to the app ribbon that (surprise!) activates Vantage.

🎉 Hooray discoverability!

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Cleaning up a few other artifacts in the code.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description:
Vantage helps you build advanced search queries using Obsidian's powerful search tools.

This update refines some parts of the code. Thanks @lishid!
releases.name: v1.0.1

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Vantage helps you build advanced searches. It integrates with the Natural Language Dates plugin by @argenos to help you search over your daily notes.
